events.title: Full Stack Web Development Workshop
events.description: A comprehensive 3-day hands-on workshop covering React, Node.js, and MongoDB alternatives. Learn to build production-ready web applications from scratch with industry best practices.

events.title: Git & GitHub Mastery Session
events.description: Master version control with Git and collaborative workflows on GitHub. Covers branching strategies, pull requests, and code reviews aligned with Code Troopers GitHub Policy.

events.title: Code Troopers Hackathon 2026
events.description: 48-hour intra-college hackathon challenging students to build innovative solutions. Themes include AI/ML, Web3, Sustainability, and Smart Campus. Prizes worth ₹50,000.

events.title: InnovateX Inter-College Hackathon
events.description: Inter-college 24-hour hackathon with 200+ participants from 15 colleges. Focus on real-world problem solving with industry mentors and startup incubation opportunities.

events.title: National Coding Championship
events.description: Competitive programming contest featuring algorithmic challenges. Top performers represent the college at national-level competitions.

events.title: Project Showcase Competition
events.description: Annual showcase where project development teams present their semester projects to faculty judges and industry guests.

events.title: Cloud Computing & DevOps Talk
events.description: Technical session on cloud-native architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices using AWS and Docker. Led by senior club members with industry internship experience.

events.title: AI & Machine Learning Deep Dive
events.description: Explore the latest trends in AI/ML including LLMs, computer vision, and practical deployment strategies. Includes live demos and Q&A session.

events.title: Industry Insights: Software Engineering Careers
events.description: Guest lecture by a senior software engineer from a leading tech company covering career paths, interview preparation, and industry expectations.

events.title: Startup Ecosystem & Entrepreneurship
events.description: Entrepreneur and startup founder shares insights on building tech startups, fundraising, and the journey from idea to product-market fit.
